Product Catalogue

ORIGINALS
Nothing Smokes Like a Lowell

Our award-winning pack that started it all. Before we came along, fine craft, transparency, and modern convenience weren't terms typically associated with the cannabis industry. Each pack contains 3.5 grams of premium rolled flower in six smooth-pulling, beautifully presented smokes. Featuring curated, effect-based blends. 3.5G WHOLE FLOWER PACK OF 6 SMOKES AT .6G EACH INCLUDES MATCHES AND A BUILT-IN STRIKE PAD FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE

QUICKS
Small But Mighty

Lowell's curated, effect-based blends, now available in .35 gram smokes. Elegantly-packed mini-pre-rolls perfect for enjoying a discreet, solo smoke on the go, or for sharing with your favorite people. 3.5G WHOLE FLOWER PACK OF 10 SMOKES AT .35G EACH INCLUDES MATCHES AND A BUILT-IN STRIKE PAD FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE

35S

Lowell 35's offer unparalleled quality and exceptional smokeability. Every pack of 35's includes 10 Tall Smokes, each containing a perfect .35g of premium, whole flower. Our entire manufacturing process is fully automated — resulting in a completely redesigned pre-roll format that promises a superior roll, every time. 35's are rolled in a range of our signature, single-origin blends. Each blend features a curated ratio of unique strains & terpene profiles designed to suit every occasion.

ONE GRAM PRE-ROLL
Single Strain, No Shake or Trim

Our premium, individual 1 gram pre-rolls are loaded with full flower — never any shake or trim. Seasonally harvested across newer and classic strains. Packaged for both freshness and safety. INCLUDES MATCHES AND A BUILT-IN STRIKE PAD FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE

THE FARMER'S EIGHTS (CURATED FLOWER)

Sometimes, a little extra can go a long way. That's why we sweat the smallest details, from cultivation to packaging, to ensure we're always giving you a little more. And now, when you purchase a Lowell eighth, you get a little extra, every time. 4 FULL GRAMS OF TOP-SHELF CANNABIS MEANT TO BE ENJOYED AND SHARED MIXED-LIGHT AND PESTICIDE-FREE COMES IN FOOD-GRADE GLASS

LITTLES (CURATED FLOWER)

At Lowell, we believe great flower comes in all shapes and sizes, and our Lowell Littles are a true representation of that. Every single bud coming out of our farm, both big and small, represents the best California flower that money can buy. Our Littles, like all our flower, are hand-picked and hand-trimmed to perfection, ensuring that even our smallest buds make a big impact.

BIGS (CURATED FLOWER)

Lowell is proud to offer a premium selection of our farm's finest. Our BIGS are hand picked for size and quality to ensure every bag of BIGS contains a curated selection of our finest strains, artfully grown by our local growing partners.

CLASSIC BUBBLE HASH
The Only Multi-Purpose Concentrate You'll Need

Our classic and versatile Bubble Hash is perfect for infusing a joint, topping a bowl, or enjoying on its own with a hash pipe. Truly the best of both worlds: flavorful, trichome-rich cannabis used for the timeless tradition of smoking hashish.

ROSIN AIO (ALL-IN-ONE) VAPE

Our artisanal solventless live Resin disposable vape pen is made with pure, cold-pressed cannabis oil and preserves the full cannabinoids and terpene profile from the raw plant. As close to the flower smoking experience as you can get in a vape.

ROSIN SAUCE 510 CART
Full Eighth of Flower, Pressed into .5G

As close to a flower smoking experience as you can get in a vape. Experience a full eighth of flower cold-pressed into our .5 gram non-distillate, solvent-less live rosin vape carts. COLD-PRESSED FULL SPECTRUM NO ARTIFICIAL FLAVORS, CUTTING AGENTS, OR ADDITIVES

Cannabis is for use by people 21 years of age or older. Products advertised on this website are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
